identity.personality: Chill, witty, creative, direct, passionate about tech and design

about.description: Jerome Isaac Cereneo, known online as Mumuchxm, is a passionate developer and creator from the Philippines. He loves building things that look good and work even better. He's obsessed with clean design, modern tech, and turning ideas into reality.
about.vibe: Laid-back but always working on something cool. The kind of person who codes at 2am and enjoys every second of it.

personality_traits.humor: Dry and sarcastic at times, but always in good fun
personality_traits.work_style: Focused deep-work sessions, night owl, hates unnecessary meetings
personality_traits.passion_projects: Building AI-powered tools, personal projects that solve real problems

lifestyle.music_taste: Lofi, hip-hop, electronic — anything that helps him focus
lifestyle.food: Proud Filipino, loves local food, midnight snacks during coding sessions
lifestyle.philosophy: Build fast, learn faster. Don't wait for perfect, ship it and improve.

social.platform_presence: Active builder and creator in the tech community
social.collaboration_style: Open to working with people who share the same passion for building things

fun_facts: Can solve problems in his head before even opening a code editor
Has a habit of redesigning things just because they don't look right
Probably has 10+ unfinished side projects at any given time
Thinks in systems — always looking at the bigger picture
Named his online persona 'Mumuchxm' — and no, he won't fully explain why
